// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: BinarySearchInterpolation
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class FastData
{


    private static readonly float[] _keys = new float[] {
        1f, 2f, 3f, 4f, 5f
    };

    
    public static bool Contains(float key)
    {


        int lo = 0;
        int hi = 4;
        while (lo <= hi && key >= _keys[lo] && key <= _keys[hi])
        {
            float loKey = _keys[lo];
            float hiKey = _keys[hi];

            if (loKey == hiKey)
            {
                if (loKey == key)
                    return true;

                break;
            }

            double range = (double)hiKey - (double)loKey;
            double offset = (double)key - (double)loKey;
            int i = lo + (int)((offset * (hi - lo)) / range);

            if (i < lo)
                i = lo;
            else if (i > hi)
                i = hi;

            float midKey = _keys[i];
            if (midKey == key)
                return true;
            if (midKey < key)
                lo = i + 1;
            else
                hi = i - 1;
        }

        return false;
    }

    public const int ItemCount = 5;
    public const float MinKey = 1f;
    public const float MaxKey = 5f;
}
